findings.issue: Insufficient or non-existent consent flow for automated decision-making
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making, ensuring compliance with GDPR Article 22
Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance before Baku launch

findings.issue: Unclear legal exposure if AURA score is used for hiring decisions
findings.recommended_fix: Consult with legal experts to clarify potential liabilities and develop strategies to mitigate risks

findings.issue: Missing DPAs for Supabase, Google Cloud, and Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Establish and sign DPAs with all data processors to ensure compliance with GDPR and other relevant regulations
Review and update Terms of Service to explicitly address AI-generated assessments and ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations
